title: The Heart of a Man
writer: Pamela Bower, Rex North, Jack Trevor Story
actors: Frankie Vaughan, Anne Heywood, Tony Britton
plot: Frankie, an out-of-work sailor, meets Bud, a tramp who claims he is a millionaire. Bud gives him a shilling and promises him that if he can make £100 from it, he will be given £1,000. Armed with this, Frankie goes off to pursue hi...
